jobs.title: Account Executive, ENT
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Flexport:&nbsp;</strong></h2><p>At Flexport, we believe global trade can move the human race forward. The Sales team partners with the largest enterprise importer/exporter customers across DACH to ship account growth on the Flexport Platform.</p><p>You'll prospect, qualify, and develop the top-of-funnel pipeline for the Flexport Enterprise book of business across Germany.</p>

jobs.title: Country Manager, Mexico
jobs.content: <h2><strong>Country Manager, Mexico</strong></h2><p>At Flexport, we make global trade easy for everyone. Our mission is to make global commerce so simple that every supply-chain operator can grow their business across borders. The Partnerships team partners with the largest importer/exporter customers across LATAM to ship account growth on the Flexport Platform.</p><p>You'll lead the Mexico business unit for the Flexport Platform across LATAM.</p>
